mapper.select: select period_id, com_id, eval_year, eval_term, title, period_status, TO_CHAR(start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS start_date, TO_CHAR(end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS end_date, TO_CHAR(created_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS created_at, TO_CHAR(updated_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS updated_at from evaluation_period where period_id = #{periodId} and com_id = #{comId}
mapper.insert: insert into evaluation_period(com_id, eval_year, eval_term, title, start_date, end_date) values( #{comId}, #{evalYear}, #{evalTerm}, #{title}, TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'))
mapper.update: update evaluation_period set title = #{title}, eval_year = #{evalYear}, eval_term = #{evalTerm}, start_date = TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), end_date = TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') where period_id = #{periodId} and com_id = #{comId}
